title: Make the e2e test network cleanup more robust.
body:
We need to check if the network exists before trying to
remove them. This allows the `removeCNINetwork` function
always to be called. This is needed by tests which are trying
to remove the network manually in order to prevent flakes.

Fixes #7809

@Luap99 My PR has merged, I think it would be best to check the exit code status on removing the network and then ignore failures if the exit code is 1.
